## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` — all tests pass
- [ ] `pnpm lint` — no errors
- [ ] `pnpm format` — code is formatted
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Version bumped in `package.json` (if publishing)
- [ ] New features include tests
- [ ] Bug fixes include regression tests
